headline: How the Iran Conflict Could Pressure Consumer Staples Companies
summary: Supply chains could be disrupted, costs could go up, and demand could weaken. But an analyst still expects staples stocks to outperform.

raw.headline: How the Iran Conflict Could Pressure Consumer Staples Companies
raw.summary: Supply chains could be disrupted, costs could go up, and demand could weaken. But an analyst still expects staples stocks to outperform.

headline: Will Mondelez's Organic Sales Growth Keep Momentum Going in 2026?
summary: MDLZ posted 4.3% organic net revenue growth in 2025 on cocoa-driven pricing. It targets flat to 2% growth in 2026 amid soft demand.

raw.headline: Will Mondelez's Organic Sales Growth Keep Momentum Going in 2026?
